metadata.description: All-in-one multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code — 201 agents, 136 skills, 49 rules, 4 hooks, 3 MCP servers. Bundles agency-agents, everything-claude-code, and oh-my-claudecode with weekly CI auto-sync.
